title: koptiretro
description: 8/12/15bits minecraft shader with pixelation and dithering!
body:
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/iris-fuchsia?style=plastic) 
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/optifine-firebrick?style=plastic)
# KOPTRETRO - Kin's retro shader
![demonstration](https://i.ibb.co/0yf6fxDB/koptiretroshowcase.png)

this is a retro shader for optifine with many color modes, dithering and pixelation filter aswell


# OPTIONS:
- dithering (it also causes pixelation)
- resolution level (how pixelized it is when with dithering)
- color depth (how many bits per color there are)
